140983884754821781970*x^94 + 42190350598301231032*x^93 - 11764013254103111260*x^92 + 3048009935022892211*x^91 - 731546653779236512*x^90 + 162059677785516160*x^89 - 33000063614069234*x^88 + 6147049936042390*x^87 - 1041534486032740*x^86 + 159449584514990*x^85 - 21878665991215*x^84 + 2664436413550*x^83 - 284499615380*x^82 + 26224432156*x^81 - 2044634717*x^80 + 131118715*x^79 - 6640634*x^78 + 249060*x^77 - 6150*x^76 + 75*x^75)*y
	+ x^75*(x-1)^85;
q := x;
t := (y+1)*(x-1)/x;
E:=[(1+q)*t+(2-q),0,q*t^2+(1-q)*t,0,0];
P:=[-t,t^2];
